arts.ttl: West Ham moving for January signing – Financial crisis can see quick move to Hammers
arts.sum: West Ham United have Lyon’s Georges Mikautadze on their radar, according to a report. The striker arrived at the Ligue 1 side from FC Metz in the summer window and signed a deal until 2028. He managed four goals and one assist from 16 games, which includes six starts. arts.ttl: Alan Shearer and Harry Redknapp agree on West Ham vs Arsenal score prediction
arts.sum: That may not matter according to Redknapp, however, who believes the likes of Martin Odegaard and Bukayo Saka should have enough quality to beat West Ham, with the former Tottenham manager predicting a 2-1 Arsenal win. Alan Shearer and Harry Redknapp believe Arsenal will come away from London Stadium with all three points on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea in 'four-way fight' for Borussia Dortmund star who 'dreams of Premier League move'
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are reportedly among four Premier League clubs showing an interest in signing Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens.

arts.ttl: Red alert for Arsenal as €40m star dragged away from Arteta
arts.sum: While Arsenal get a Club Fit score of 73, PSG hit 76. PSG should be taken seriously be Arsenal as a rival for Marmoush not just because of the financial wealth of the club: they are also seen as a more suitable team for the striker to thrive in.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues major injury update on key defenders ahead of Arsenal clash vs West Ham
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says Ben White’s knee surgery 'went really well' - but the club are still being very cautious regarding his rehabilitation. Asked about White’s surgery on Friday, ahead of Arsenal's trip to West Ham United on Saturday, Arteta said: “Still early days - the surgery went really well; there is no reaction after that.

arts.ttl: Arsenal XI vs West Ham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal make the short trip across the capital to face West Ham United at the London Stadium this weekend. Mikel Arteta admitted during Friday’s pre-match press conference that confidence is back in his squad, following impressive wins over Nottingham Forest and Sporting Lisbon.
